calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-016 precision-to-commitment circuit: dACC precision_commit_ratio
items.notes: Requeued 2026-05-07 after SIGTERM (exit code -15) on ree-cloud-1 2026-05-06T09:28Z. Tests E3-derived precision modulating commit threshold via dACC precision_commit_ratio.

items.title: Goal seeding lift ablation: SD-018 + z_goal + benefit_eval + MECH-295 vs baseline
items.notes: Tests full goal seeding pipeline end-to-end. 2-arm ablation (ARM_0=baseline, ARM_1=full pipeline). Pass=goal_lift>=1.5 in 2/3 seeds. Also fixes from_dims wiring bug: cfg.e3.goal_weight must be set manually. Claims: ARC-030/MECH-112/SD-018/SD-012/MECH-295.
